notableEvents.label: Brandon Nimmo plunked
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Nimmo hit by pitch. Andrew McCutchen to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson doubles (4) on a line drive to left fielder Mickey Moniak.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Tyler Freeman. Joc Pederson out at 2nd on the throw, right fielder Tyler Freeman to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jake McCarthy. Evan Carter to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson singles on a ground ball to left fielder Mickey Moniak. Danny Jansen scores.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson grounds out, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield.

notableEvents.label: Sam Haggerty GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sam Haggerty grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to second baseman Edouard Julien to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Justin Foscue out at 2nd. Sam Haggerty out at 1st.
